description: Validation rules for the multi-agent requirements debate loop

VR-001.name: Flag precedence: --no-debate wins over --debate
VR-001.rationale: Conservative default per ADR-0003 and Article X

VR-002.name: Flag precedence: --debate overrides -light
VR-002.rationale: --debate is explicit user intent to enable debate

VR-003.name: Light flag implies no debate
VR-003.rationale: -light = minimal process, debate is additional process

VR-004.name: Standard sizing defaults to debate ON

VR-005.name: Epic sizing defaults to debate ON
VR-005.rationale: Epic features benefit most from multi-agent review

VR-006.name: No flags, no sizing defaults to debate ON
VR-006.rationale: Debate is the new default for feature workflows

VR-011.name: debate_state.max_rounds must be 3
VR-011.rationale: Fixed at 3 for Phase 01 per ADR-0002

VR-013.name: debate_state.blocking_findings must be integer or null
VR-013.rationale: null before first Critic review, integer after

VR-014.name: rounds_history entries must have required fields
VR-014.rationale: Complete audit trail for debate-summary.md generation

VR-015.name: rounds_history.action must be valid enum
VR-015.rationale: Only three possible outcomes per round

VR-020.name: Critique report must contain Summary section
VR-020.rationale: Orchestrator parses Summary for convergence check

VR-021.name: Summary must contain BLOCKING count row
VR-021.rationale: Convergence is determined by BLOCKING count == 0

VR-022.name: BLOCKING findings must have B-NNN prefix

VR-023.name: WARNING findings must have W-NNN prefix

VR-024.name: Each finding must have Target field
VR-024.rationale: Findings must reference specific requirement IDs

VR-025.name: Each finding must have Category field
VR-025.rationale: Category enables systematic tracking of finding types

VR-026.name: Each finding must have Recommendation field

VR-030.name: Refiner must append Changes section to requirements-spec.md

VR-031.name: All ACs in Refiner output must use Given/When/Then format

VR-032.name: All NFRs in Refiner output must have quantified metrics

VR-033.name: Refiner must not introduce new requirements
VR-033.description: FR count in Refiner output must equal FR count in input (may add ACs to existing FRs)
VR-033.rationale: Refiner fixes findings, does not expand scope

VR-040.name: Critique files must follow round-N-critique.md pattern

VR-041.name: debate-summary.md must exist after debate loop completes
VR-041.condition: active_workflow.debate_mode == true AND debate loop completed
VR-041.rationale: FR-006: audit trail of debate outcomes

VR-051.name: DEBATE_CONTEXT must include round field
VR-051.rationale: Round tracking for artifact labeling and audit

VR-052.name: Refiner DEBATE_CONTEXT must include prior_critique path
VR-052.rationale: Refiner needs critique report to know what to fix

VR-053.name: Critic DEBATE_CONTEXT must include all artifact paths
VR-053.rationale: Critic must review all four artifacts

VR-060.name: Absent DEBATE_CONTEXT = single-agent mode
VR-060.description: When DEBATE_CONTEXT is not present in Task prompt, agent must behave exactly as before this feature

VR-061.name: Absent debate_mode in state.json = debate OFF
VR-061.rationale: NFR-002: backward compatibility with existing workflows

VR-062.name: Single-agent mode must produce identical artifacts
VR-062.description: When debate is OFF, Phase 01 output must be identical to pre-feature behavior
